title: Looking for a particular trailer
wikitext:
[]: Looking for a particular trailer             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Mon Oct 07, 2013 2:18 pm My friend and I are looking for a particular trailer for EoE, it's a really short Japanese one with just a massive montage of images from EoE/the series and from what I remember of it, ends with some creepy laughter. My friend and I are going crazy looking for it, could somebody link us it? Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Oct 07, 2013 3:00 pm You mean this one?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 07, 2013 3:08 pm That's quality advertising.

[]:             Quote Post by peripateia » Mon Oct 07, 2013 3:11 pm This probably won't be what you're looking for, but I wanted to post this trailer anyway-it's the Japanese Theatrical trailer of EoE set to Dies Irae. One of my favs. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UQ-4myiJIQg

[]:             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Mon Oct 07, 2013 3:24 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: You mean this one?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Oct 07, 2013 3:34 pm No problem. It's only of my favorite TV spots in all of ever. There's a second version of it, but I can't seem to find it.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Tue Oct 08, 2013 12:59 pm peripateia wrote: This probably won't be what you're looking for, but I wanted to post this trailer anyway-it's the Japanese Theatrical trailer of EoE set to Dies Irae. One of my favs. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UQ-4myiJIQg

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Oct 08, 2013 1:05 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: You mean this one?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 12, 2013 4:37 pm Slightly off-topic, but I'm really hoping at least one of the trailers for Final will be as "powerful" (imagery and music) as the ones for Death & Rebirth and EoE were...

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Sat Oct 12, 2013 6:34 pm ath wrote: That's the theatrical trailer for Death and Rebirth, though. The official trailer of The End of Evangelion is this one . There's such a contrast between them, but I absolutely love them both. As for Verdi's Dies Irae, there's also a very slight chance we could hear one of his other famous pieces in FINAL...
summary:
[]: Looking for a particular trailer             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Mon Oct 07, 2013 2:18 pm My friend and I are looking for a particular trailer for EoE, it's a really short Japanese one with just a massive montage of images from EoE/the series and from what I remember of it, ends with some creepy laughter. My friend and I are going crazy looking for it, could somebody link us it? Thanks.
